---
name: create-instructions
agent: Instructions Generator
description: Use when you want to create a new instruction file for a specific layer of architecture or coding standard within the app.
---

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the docs/ directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an approriate filename bases on generated content. Make sure the instructions are consise, clear, and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about layer of architecture or coding standard to document.
